title: SIHYWTCAMD Extensions
description: Extension mod of SIHYWTCAMD for features requiring the mod on client
body:
[![Modrinth Version](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/v/AYwPB5Hm?logo=modrinth&color=dark_green)](https://modrinth.com/mod/difficulty_extensions/versions)
[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/786967180431458355?logo=discord&color=blue)](https://discord.com/invite/eNwkve8k7c)
[![GitHub Issues](https://img.shields.io/github/issues/sf-inc/sihywtcamd_extensions?logo=github&color=white)](https://github.com/sf-inc/sihywtcamd_extensions/issues)

**NO PORT TO FORGE PLANNED!** *(but feel free to port it by yourself and link it)*

***The mod is fully configurable to enable only changes that you like***

# Description

This mod is en extension mod of [SIHYWTCAMD](https://modrinth.com/mod/difficulty). The main mod was split in order to be fully server-side. This extension includes every feature that were required on the client, and will also contain new features in the future.

Although we've changed almost every mob already, feel free to ask for new features or changes in the [GitHub](https://github.com/sf-inc/sihywtcamd/issues) or the [Discord](https://discord.gg/eNwkve8k7c). Indeed, don't hesitate to share your experience and tell me if you think I should tweak anything to make the experience even better =)

This is a short description, full description below.  
More detailed information available on the [Wiki](https://github.com/sf-inc/sihywtcamd/wiki).

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/Jf1W2m_LFqk" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

# FAQ

- **Does it work on a server?** Yes, it works on a server. File needed for **both** client **and** server

- **Can I include it in my modpack?** Yes, you are free to include this mod into your modpack

- **For any other things:** Feel free to share your experience, problems, enhancement ideas in the Discord server, or directly creating issues on the GitHub

# Full description

<details>
<summary>Arthropods</summary>

## Spiders General

* Adults can spit webs at targets that spawn a messy cobweb on collision with an entity

## Spider

* Can spawn other weaker spiders on death, their number depends on local difficulty
  * Weaker spiders are babies that deal half damage and have half health
* Can spawn in group of babies (natural spawn required)

## Cave spider

* Can spawn other weaker spiders on death, their number depends on local difficulty
  * Weaker spiders are babies that deal half damage and have half health, and less poison
* Can spawn in group of babies (natural spawn required)
</details>

<details>
<summary>Skeletons</summary>

## Skeletons General

* Can spawn baby
* Babies shoot valve of arrows

## Wither skeleton

* Can spawn as a baby
</details>

<details>
<summary>Cosmetics</summary>

* Ghost-like mobs have a translucent model: phantoms, allays, vexes, ghasts
</details>
